why_forbidden: All numbers are development-stage on capped balanced subsets; ood_test unread.
allowed_replacement_wording: In the capped development setting, GroupDRO improves ood_val ranking over its matched ERM control.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: The single locked ood_test (center 2) evaluation under written authorization.

forbidden_claim: The model is ready for clinical deployment.
why_forbidden: Patch-level, capped-subset, development-stage; no clinical endpoint or WSI aggregation.
allowed_replacement_wording: This is a development-stage reliability/DG audit, not a clinical performance study.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: Full/final evaluation, WSI/patient-level aggregation, external cohorts, clinical validation.

forbidden_claim: GroupDRO beats old plain ERM in a controlled comparison.
why_forbidden: Old plain ERM used a different (confounded) cache and id_val subset; not matched.
allowed_replacement_wording: GroupDRO beats its MATCHED center-stratified ERM control; old plain ERM is context-only.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: An old-plain-ERM re-train on the sound center-stratified cache (matched) — not planned.

forbidden_claim: The selected candidate operating thresholds are final.
why_forbidden: Only id_val-selected candidate points exist; none committed; development-stage.
allowed_replacement_wording: Candidate id_val-selected operating points are reported for illustration only (not committed).
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: A committed operating-point selection on ood_val (gated), then frozen for the test.

forbidden_claim: Calibrated probabilities are validated on an independent test.
why_forbidden: Temperature was fit AND evaluated on the same ood_val subset (R7).
allowed_replacement_wording: Temperature scaling improves calibration on this ood_val subset (argmax-invariant).
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: A separate calibration vs evaluation split (or fit-on-one-hospital / eval-on-another).

forbidden_claim: The ood_test result can be inferred from ood_val.
why_forbidden: ood_test (center 2) is a distinct unseen hospital; ood_val (center 1) cannot substitute.
allowed_replacement_wording: ood_val is a development-stage OOD proxy; the held-out test hospital is unread.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: The single locked ood_test evaluation (center 2) under written authorization.

forbidden_claim: The model is robust to all hospital shifts.
why_forbidden: Only one OOD-val hospital (center 1) tested; single dataset; capped subset.
allowed_replacement_wording: GroupDRO improves development-stage robustness to the center-1 shift over its matched control.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: Multiple held-out hospitals / external cohorts + the final locked test.

why_forbidden: 7A/7D/7E were on the old confounded cache and capped subsets; scope-limited negative result.
allowed_replacement_wording: On this capped development subset, the tested stain-augmentation variants did not beat plain-ERM ranking.
what_would_be_needed_to_unlock: Broader stain-normalization studies (e.g. Macenko/Vahadane) on sound full-scale data.
